introSection: Freij's Euro Star is a steel roller coaster owned by Freij Entertainment International.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
An Indian man who was operating the roller coaster at Global Village in Shanghai, China was killed when he fell from the ride. His coat had been caught by a train which caused him to fall over. The operators of the event stated that the attendant was working for Freij International, not the event itself and that the ride attendant had not followed instructions.

The roller coaster operated at the Global Carnival event in 2016 in Bangkok, Thailand.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains are the most modern kind found on Pinfari Zyklon roller coasters.

fullText:
Freij's Euro Star is a steel roller coaster owned by Freij Entertainment International.

An Indian man who was operating the roller coaster at Global Village in Shanghai, China was killed when he fell from the ride. His coat had been caught by a train which caused him to fall over. The operators of the event stated that the attendant was working for Freij International, not the event itself and that the ride attendant had not followed instructions.

The roller coaster operated at the Global Carnival event in 2016 in Bangkok, Thailand.

Purple track with yellow supports.

The trains are the most modern kind found on Pinfari Zyklon roller coasters.
